title: Functional Models, Values, and Observable Effects · Effects Clinic: Value Model
summary: Refactor a mutable billing script whose hidden state makes reruns disagree. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp value model increment in an effect map and behavior-preserving functional baseline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish value transformations from identity-changing commands in an execution trace.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
